Gene_Accession_Number.reason: Materials and Methods states full-length Ps4CL1-4 sequences were deposited in GenBank under accession No. PX438698, PX438699, PX438700, and PX438701, respectively; thus Ps4CL2 = PX438699.

Source_Species.reason: The paper repeatedly identifies the gene as from Scots pine.

Source_Species_Latin_Name.reason: The title/summary identify Scots pine as Pinus sylvestris.

Applied_Species.reason: The functional/pathway context studied is Scots pine.

Applied_Species_Latin_Name.reason: The paper concerns pathway function in Pinus sylvestris.

Terminal_Metabolite_Class.reason: Pinosylvin and derivatives are described as stilbenoids; Ps4CL2 is proposed for pinosylvin biosynthesis.

Terminal_Metabolite.reason: Ps4CL2 is proposed as the cinnamate-activating enzyme for pinosylvin biosynthesis.

Terminal_Metabolite_Function.reason: Summary/Discussion state pinosylvin and derivatives are defense-related stilbenoids contributing to pathogen resistance and heartwood decay resistance.

Terminal_Metabolite_Accumulation_Site.reason: Results discuss elevated expression in transition zone to heartwood and heartwood; pinosylvin is synthesized in the TZ between sapwood and heartwood and associated with heartwood.

Biosynthetic_Pathway.reason: The paper explicitly studies Ps4CL2 as candidate enzyme in pinosylvin biosynthesis.

Pathway_Branch_or_Subpathway.reason: Discussion states 4CL acts before branching into lignin, flavonoid, and stilbene biosynthesis; pinosylvin belongs to the stilbene branch of phenylpropanoid metabolism.

Enzyme_Name.reason: Ps4CL2 is one of four identified 4-coumarate:CoA ligase isoforms.

EC_Number.reason: No EC number is given in the paper for Ps4CL2 or 4CL.

Protein_Family_or_Domain.reason: Results note conserved Box I and Box II motifs in Scots pine 4CLs, consistent with the 4CL/acyl-activating enzyme family.

Expression_Pattern_of_Source_Species.reason: Results/Figure 3 state Ps4CL2-4 were co-expressed with PsSTS and PsPMT2 and had higher expression under stilbene-inducing conditions, using wounding, heartwood formation, and UV-C datasets.

Expression_Pattern_of_Applied_Species.reason: Discussion says Ps4CL2-4 were expressed in tissues accumulating stilbenes and had higher expression under stilbene-inducing conditions.

Primary_Substrate.reason: Kinetic assays tested cinnamic acid and 4-coumaric acid, and Ps4CL2 used both.

Primary_Product.reason: HPLC-DAD confirmed production of corresponding cinnamoyl-CoA and 4-coumaroyl-CoA thioesters from cinnamic and 4-coumaric acid.

Catalyzed_Reaction_Description.reason: Results and methods state Scots pine enzymes consumed cinnamic acid or 4-coumaric acid together with CoA, and discussion/methods indicate ATP-dependent activation to CoA thioesters.

Metabolic_Step_Position.reason: Discussion explicitly says activation of cinnamic acid is the first committed/critical step toward pinosylvin biosynthesis.

End_Product_Connection_Type.reason: Cinnamoyl-CoA formed by Ps4CL2 is described as an essential precursor for pinosylvin biosynthesis, i.e. immediate precursor-forming step.

Rate_Limiting_or_Key_Control_Step.reason: The paper calls this the critical/first committed step and last missing enzyme, but does not experimentally establish rate limitation or a control point.

Core_Phenotypic_Effect.reason: Results/Discussion conclude Ps4CL2 is the prime candidate for the missing cinnamate-activating enzyme promoting pinosylvin biosynthesis due to high cinnamate affinity.

Core_Validation_Method.reason: All listed methods were used: transcript co-expression, heterologous expression in N. benthamiana, HPLC-DAD, kinetics, site-directed mutagenesis, chimeric/domain swapping, and phylogenetic analysis.

Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene.reason: Each listed point matches Results/Discussion: co-expression with PsSTS/PsPMT2, highest catalytic efficiency toward cinnamate due to low Km, proposal as missing enzyme, and multidomain basis for preference.

Other_Important_Info.reason: Results state Ps4CL2 did not discriminate between cinnamic and 4-coumaric acid, had exceptionally low Km for cinnamate, and Discussion notes final in planta proof via downregulation was not performed because it is challenging.

Environment_or_Treatment_Factor.reason: Figure 3 legend and text specify stilbene-inducing conditions from wounding, heartwood formation, and UV-C irradiation.

Breeding_or_Engineering_Application_Valu.reason: This is a forward-looking application inference; the paper does not explicitly discuss breeding, engineering, gene stacking, or applied improvement strategies.

Interacting_Proteins.reason: PsSTS and PsPMT2 are co-expressed genes, but no physical or direct protein interaction with Ps4CL2 was tested.

Omics_Data.reason: Results explicitly cite de novo assembly/RNA-seq transcriptome datasets from Lim et al. 2016, 2021 and Paasela et al. 2023.
